docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY SANTA MARIA JUAN CARLOS SANTA MARIA LETICIA A. AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES:MNG PARTNER DBA CENTRAL TOWER APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES:MNG PARTNER DBA CENTRAL TOWER APTS
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO MOSSNER CHARLES, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTA MARIA JUAN CARLOS SANTA MARIA LETICIA A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSSER CHARLES:MNG PARTNER DBA CENTRAL TOWER APTS $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $658.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
